author: Besting
text: HEADS-UP 2026-06-05 (config/store split, bl-2e26 §15): the 2-hop trail this task closes (landing->origin->central) is DISSOLVED by the revision — federation is now many landings naming ONE store branch (tasks_branch), no transitive discovery. Per instruction this claimed task may land as-is; its trail-loop mechanism is then superseded by the tracker correction bl-cd21 (store-remote sync, not transitive next:).

author: Besting
text: SWEEP REQUEST (2026-06-06): the config/store split DISSOLVED the 2-hop trail this task targets — federation is now many landings naming ONE store branch (tasks_branch), no transitive discovery (bl-2e26 §12). Before landing, SWEEP your work to the new model: no trail-walk / next:-chain materialization; the tracker syncs tasks_branch<->its remote (ff-only/union) with remote resolution pointer>origin, per bl-cd21. If trail-walk code is already written, REMOVE it rather than land it (bl-9329 deletes the walk). A verification task (below) will confirm the outcome regardless.
